description_long: This is a modern L-shaped chaise sofa with a left-facing extended lounge section and a three-seat main section. The upholstery is a smooth, solid taupe or light brown fabric, giving it a contemporary and neutral appearance suitable for urban environments. The backrest is straight and segmented into three equal sections, each with a matching cushion, while the armrests are squared and of equal height on both ends. The seat cushions are thick and plush, with the lounge section featuring a single, larger cushion for extended comfort. The sofa stands on six slender, black metal legs that are slightly tapered, providing stability and a touch of elegance. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible decorative elements or patterns.
description: A modern L-shaped chaise sofa in taupe fabric with squared armrests, segmented backrest, and black metal legs. The design is minimalist and plush, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three back cushions, and both armrests, with the lounge section extending to the left.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the depth of the lounge section and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the straight, segmented backrest and the uniform height of the back and armrests.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, showing the main seating area and the right armrest, with the lounge section receding.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, medium-height, and divided into three equal segments, each with a matching cushion. It has a clean, unadorned surface with no visible tufting or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both the left and right sides, squared in shape and matching the height of the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, slender, and slightly tapered, made of black metal with a smooth finish and no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid taupe color with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three back cushions and three seat cushions, with the leftmost seat cushion extending to form the lounge section. All cushions appear to be attached and are evenly arranged for a uniform look.
